channel.title: Twitter Timeline RSS
channel.description: 你的 Twitter Following Timeline（via opencli）

item.title: Sam’s not the right CEO for OpenAI anymore. He squandered their lead, failed to deliver the AGI he p...
item.description:
Sam’s not the right CEO for OpenAI anymore. He squandered their lead, failed to deliver the AGI he promised, flailed productwise, and torched his own reputation; meanwhile he is burning money at a unprecedented a rate.
If I were a shareholder, I would vote for someone new.
--- @GaryMarcus | ❤️ 1 | 🔁 0 | 💬 1 | 👁 426
item.author: @GaryMarcus
